notes: Hand-refreshed 10-symbol calibration from the 2026-03-02 to 2026-05-01 replay. Keeps the expanded universe active while blocking symbol/signal lanes that were persistently negative in the 60-day sample. This is deliberately conservative: it scans more symbols, but does not let BTC-style short/impulse lanes run on pairs where that lane failed.

IMPULSE_EVENT_CONTINUATION_SHORT.block_reason: BTC impulse shorts lost 17-trade sample in 60d replay; keep BTC as long-biased breakout/impulse until short lane improves.

TREND_CONTINUATION_LONG.block_reason: Single BTC trend-continuation long failed; prefer coil/pressure/impulse long lanes.

COIL_BREAKOUT_LONG.block_reason: ETH coil breakout long failed in replay; ETH edge was impulse/trend long, not coil breakout.

IMPULSE_EVENT_CONTINUATION_SHORT.block_reason: ETH impulse shorts were persistently negative; keep ETH event continuation long-biased.

TREND_CONTINUATION_SHORT.block_reason: ETH trend shorts were 0W/3L in replay.

COIL_BREAKOUT_LONG.block_reason: SOL coil breakout failed; only SOL trend-continuation long showed edge.

IMPULSE_EVENT_CONTINUATION_LONG.block_reason: SOL impulse longs were negative in 23-trade sample.

IMPULSE_EVENT_CONTINUATION_SHORT.block_reason: SOL impulse shorts were negative in 22-trade sample.

PRESSURE_BREAK_SHORT.block_reason: SOL pressure short failed; not enough evidence to keep active.

TREND_CONTINUATION_SHORT.block_reason: SOL trend short failed; keep SOL long-trend only.

IMPULSE_EVENT_CONTINUATION_LONG.block_reason: PEPE impulse longs were negative; memecoin continuation needs stronger event confirmation before re-enabling.

IMPULSE_EVENT_CONTINUATION_SHORT.block_reason: PEPE impulse shorts were deeply negative; avoid fading meme squeezes.

PRESSURE_BREAK_LONG.block_reason: PEPE pressure long failed; leave only pressure-break short lane active from replay.

COIL_BREAKOUT_LONG.block_reason: TAO edge came from impulse-event longs, not coil breakout.

IMPULSE_EVENT_CONTINUATION_SHORT.block_reason: TAO impulse shorts were negative; AI-beta rallies squeezed shorts.

RANGE_EXPANSION_CONTINUATION_LONG.block_reason: TAO range-expansion longs were 0W/3L; use impulse-event long instead.

TREND_CONTINUATION_SHORT.block_reason: TAO trend short failed; keep TAO long-biased.

COIL_BREAKDOWN_SHORT.block_reason: BNB coil breakdown short failed; BNB short edge was impulse-only.

IMPULSE_EVENT_CONTINUATION_LONG.block_reason: BNB impulse longs were slightly negative; keep BNB coil long / impulse short / trend long only.

IMPULSE_EVENT_CONTINUATION_SHORT.block_reason: BCH impulse shorts were negative; BCH worked better on breakout and long impulse.

PRESSURE_BREAK_SHORT.block_reason: BCH pressure short failed; avoid one-off weak short lane.

COIL_BREAKDOWN_SHORT.block_reason: SEI coil breakdown short failed; SEI edge is impulse/event and trend short, not coil short.

TREND_CONTINUATION_LONG.block_reason: SEI trend-continuation long failed; keep stronger SEI impulse and short trend lanes.

COIL_BREAKDOWN_SHORT.block_reason: LINK coil breakdown short failed; LINK worked on oracle/RWA-style long impulse and trend long.

PRESSURE_BREAK_LONG.block_reason: LINK pressure long failed; wait for clearer impulse or coil breakout.

IMPULSE_EVENT_CONTINUATION_SHORT.block_reason: ZEC impulse shorts were negative; current privacy-coin tape rewards upside continuation more than fading.
